steps:
1. Original amount: £286,549.
2. Round to nearest ten thousand: Look at the thousands digit (6). Since 6 ≥ 5, round up. Ten thousands digit is 8, so rounding up gives 290,000.
3. Round to nearest thousand: Look at the hundreds digit (5). Since 5 ≥ 5, round up. Thousands digit is 6, so rounding up gives 287,000.
4. Difference: 290,000 − 287,000 = £3,000.
5. Check options: £3,000 corresponds to option C.
